jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Cipla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cipla has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cipla:
Cipla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla!
